description: As part of a building sale, the owner's agent must collect estoppel certificates from all commercial tenants.

nodes.task_description: Identify all current tenants in the building being sold.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent generates a list of all tenants.

nodes.task_description: Generate a blank estoppel certificate form and send it to each tenant for completion.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent distributes the form to all tenants.

nodes.task_description: Track the return of the signed certificates and follow up with tenants who have not responded by the deadline.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent ensures all certificates are collected on time.
